_doc: 『ともしび』シーン挿絵のデータ駆動定義。章をまたいで再利用する。各シーンは cast.json のキャラ id と stages の舞台 id を参照し、生成時には ref_chars に挙げたキャラの確定立ち絵(out/cast/<id>.png)を参照画像として gpt-image-2 の images.edit に添付する設計。existing_asset は旧 Anima で作った既存挿絵の対応表(描き直しの突き合わせ用)。
pov_rule: 主人公アキはシーン挿絵では極力映さない(一人称POV)。pov=true のシーンは『手・前腕＋カンテラ』『後ろ頭・肩越し』『画面外』に留め、被写体はユイ・情景・敵にする。

stages.nagi_village: A Western-medieval European mountain-valley village of rustic half-timber cottages (stone bases, timber-framed plaster walls, wood-shingle roofs, a little thatch), pre-modern rustic style, warm flame light. NOT a Japanese gassho-style village.
stages.great_lamp: An old rustic stone-and-timber beacon tower (a great-lamp) with rough masonry and wooden scaffolding, a large warm flame burning at its top.
stages.nagi_village_alley: A narrow rustic village alley between Western-medieval half-timber cottages (stone bases, wood-shingle roofs) at night, warm scattered lamplight and deep shadow. NOT a Japanese village.
stages.road2: A pre-modern country road of packed dirt and stone winding over gentle grassy hills, rustic landscape.
stages.caravan: A merchant caravan of wooden covered wagons with cloth tarps in a roadside hollow, rustic pre-modern traders, a warm campfire.
stages.trade_town: A distant pre-modern stone-walled trading town with rustic stone buildings and city walls glowing with tiny warm lights on the horizon.
stages.ash_modifier: Creeping grey ash mist, words and letters turning to ash. Keep it ashen, NOT snow or winter.
stages.festival_village: The same Western-medieval European mountain-valley village of rustic half-timber cottages (stone bases, timber-framed plaster walls, wood-shingle roofs), now dressed for a night festival: strings of warm paper lanterns hung between the cottages, garlands and small offering-lamps along the lanes, a festive bustling air in mellow afternoon-to-dusk light. NOT a Japanese matsuri or gassho village; pre-modern rustic Western style, warm flame light.
stages.grandfather_desk: Inside a rustic Western-medieval mountain-village cottage at night: the grandfather's old worn wooden writing desk against a half-timber plaster wall, an open hand-copied parchment manuscript tome with quill pen and a clay inkpot, shelves of rolled vellum and old books in warm shadow, lit by a single warm flame. Pre-modern, humble, intimate. NOT a modern study, NO printed books, NO Japanese interior.
stages.yui_home_interior: The humble interior of Yui's cottage at the foot of the village bell tower: rustic Western-medieval timber-and-plaster walls, a small shuttered window, simple wooden furniture and plain cloth, warm dim daylight. A modest pre-modern village home, NOT a Japanese tatami room, no modern furniture or electric light.
stages.village_palisade: The defensive perimeter of the Western-medieval valley village at night: a rough timber-and-stone palisade fence of upright logs and dry-stone footing ringing the cottages, lit by warm lantern flame against deep dark. A rustic pre-modern village fence, NOT modern fencing, barbed wire, concrete, or steel.
stages.nagi_village_palisade: The rough defensive wooden palisade fence at the edge of the Western-medieval mountain-valley village of Nagi: vertical sharpened timber stakes lashed together, packed-dirt ground, rustic half-timber cottages behind, pre-modern rustic style, night with warm scattered lamplight and deep shadow. NOT a Japanese village, NOT modern.
stages.nagi_village_gate: The main gate in the wooden palisade of the Western-medieval mountain-valley village of Nagi: a heavy rustic timber gateway with iron-banded wooden doors set into the log palisade, opening onto a dark packed-dirt road leading out of the valley, rustic half-timber cottages within, pre-modern rustic style, night with warm lamplight. NOT a Japanese village, NOT modern.
stages.pass_forest: A pre-modern Western-medieval mountain-pass forest: a rising dirt-and-stone trail winding up beside a clear pebbled brook, tall unfamiliar broadleaf trees and pines, mossy fallen logs, dappled green light, rustic untouched wilderness. NOT a Japanese forest, no signage, no power lines.
stages.trade_town_market: A bustling pre-modern stone-paved market street inside a walled trading town: rows of wooden stalls with cloth awnings, stacked wares and sacks, wooden price tally-tokens hung on strings, crowds of rustic traders, grey city walls visible beyond.
stages.guild_hall: The dim earthen-floored interior of a lamp-singers guild hall: stone and timber, a wooden request-board hung with wooden tally-tokens, warm low lamplight, rustic and pre-modern.

scenes.cap: いつか谷の外へ(井戸端): 主人公の肩越しPOV＋朝の井戸＋水を汲む幼馴染ユイ(先週12歳)＋水面に映る谷空
scenes.en: Morning at an old rustic stone village well. Over-the-shoulder POV: in the lower foreground, only the back of the unseen protagonist's head and one shoulder, with a hand resting on the well's weathered wooden frame. Across the well stands Yui, his childhood friend, hauling up a wooden bucket on the rope and twisting back toward the viewer with a cheeky fanged grin. The still water surface mirrors the bright valley sky. Behind them, rustic Western-medieval half-timber cottages and the great stone-and-timber beacon-lamp tower rise in the morning light.

scenes.cap: 屋根の上: 主人公の後ろ頭・肩越しPOV＋振り返るユイ＋眼下の村祭り＋谷の素朴な灯台
scenes.en: Evening on the village rooftops. Over-the-shoulder shot: in the lower foreground, only the back of the unseen protagonist's head and shoulder. A few steps away on a wood-shingle rooftop sits Yui, twisting back toward the viewer with a cheeky grin. Far below, the village square glows with a small festival of warm lamps, and the great stone-and-timber beacon-lamp tower rises in the valley beyond.

scenes.cap: 消える大灯: 素朴な灯台の火が落ちる＋灰の靄(人物なし)
scenes.en: No people at all. The great stone-and-timber beacon-lamp tower at night, its large warm flame guttering and dying down to faint embers, while a creeping grey ash mist seeps up around its base and drifts across the scene, draining the color toward dull grey. Ominous and sorrowful, the light of the world going out.

scenes.cap: 最初の灯: 一人称POV(手＋カンテラ)＋放射状の光＋照らされ振り返るユイ
scenes.en: First-person POV at night in the village street. The viewer's own hand and forearm hold up an old brass kantera lantern in the foreground, its newly lit flame casting radiant beams of warm light outward. The light catches Yui a few steps ahead as she turns back toward the viewer, eyes wide and grinning, lit warmly against the dark.

scenes.cap: 灰狼の影: 路地の奥の獣シルエット＋手前に立ちすくむ村人の背(主人公なし)
scenes.en: A narrow night village alley. At the far dark end, the menacing silhouette of a large black wolf-beast (the hairou), faintly glowing, grey ash leaking from its maw. In the foreground, the back of a frozen, frightened villager rooted in place. The protagonist is not shown. Tense and ominous.

scenes.cap: ボス灰狼: POV(手前に腕＋カンテラ・顔は映さない)＋巨狼＋舞う灰の文字
scenes.en: First-person POV boss confrontation in the night alley. The viewer's own forearm and an old brass kantera lantern fill the lower foreground (the viewer's face is never shown). Ahead crouches a huge menacing black wolf-beast leaking grey ash, and between them glowing letters and ashen words swirl in the air. High tension.

scenes.cap: 戻らない言葉: 星を見る老灯守＋遠くに小さな二人(ほろ苦)
scenes.en: A quiet bittersweet night in the Western-medieval village. The gentle old lamp-keeper sits alone on a low stone wall, gazing up at the vast star-filled sky, having lost his words, a small lamp resting beside him. Quiet empty lanes and cottages behind him. A small lone human figure under an immense sky, melancholy and tender. No other people.

scenes.cap: 星空の街道: POV(肩越し)＋歩み去るユイの小さな後ろ姿＋満天の星
scenes.en: Over-the-shoulder POV on a country road at deep night. In the foreground, the soft blurred shoulder and back of the unseen protagonist. Ahead, the small back figure of Yui walking away up the pale road, under an overwhelming sky full of stars and the faint band of the milky way. Lonely and beautiful.

scenes.cap: はじめての街道: 先を行くユイの後ろ姿・石垣の道・遠い谷の町・朝
scenes.en: Morning on the open road. Yui walks ahead up a packed dirt-and-stone road lined with low dry-stone walls, winding over green grassy hills, seen from behind at a gentle distance. Far ahead in the valley, a distant town is faintly visible on the horizon. Soft pale morning light, the hopeful start of a journey.

scenes.cap: 隊商の焚き火: 厚い灰の靄を拳で散らす大柄なガク・幌の荷車・焚き火
scenes.en: At the caravan camp at dusk. The large muscular boy Gaku throws a bare-fisted punch forward, the blow scattering a thick bank of grey ash mist apart into dispersing wisps. Behind him, covered wagons and a warm crackling campfire. Dynamic, heroic, full of energy.

scenes.cap: 灰の手先ドゥド: 単体・くすんだ灯詞を灰に崩す不穏な登場
scenes.en: An ominous entrance on a country road at dusk. The gaunt hooded ash-servant Doudo stands alone, his ashen grey hands crumbling dull, sickly glowing lamp-words into drifting grey ash that swirls around him. Unsettling and quietly threatening.

scenes.cap: 灯詞バトル決着: 撃破されるドゥド単体・灰が暖色の燠火にほどけて静かに崩れる
scenes.en: The end of the duel on the road. The ash-servant Doudo stands alone, defeated; the grey ash that made him is quietly unraveling and dissolving into gentle warm ember-light as he crumbles away. A quiet, melancholy resolution rather than a violent one.

scenes.cap: 次の灯へ: 笑顔で別れを告げるガク・先を行くユイの後ろ姿・遠景の交易街
scenes.en: Toward the next light, at dusk. In the foreground the big cheerful Gaku grins broadly and raises a hand in a warm farewell toward the unseen viewer. The dirt road leads on down the hillside toward a walled trading town glowing with tiny warm lights on the horizon. A warm, hopeful parting. No other companions in frame.

scenes.cap: 灯の村の朝: 主人公の肩越しPOV＋朝のナギ村の通り＋腰に手を当て呆れ顔で水汲みを急かす幼馴染ユイ(先週12歳)＋谷の素朴な灯台
scenes.en: Early morning on the main lane of a Western-medieval European mountain-valley village. Over-the-shoulder POV: in the lower foreground, only the back of the unseen protagonist's head and one shoulder. A few steps ahead in the lane stands Yui, his childhood friend, one hand on her hip, leaning forward with a half-exasperated cheeky fanged grin as if scolding him to go fetch water for the festival. Soft pale golden morning light slants between rustic half-timber cottages (stone bases, timber-framed plaster walls, wood-shingle roofs); the great stone-and-timber beacon-lamp tower rises in the valley beyond. Warm, lively, everyday. Pre-modern rustic medieval style. Avoid: modern clothes, concrete, steel, glass, skyscraper, neon, sci-fi, Japanese gassho village, text, letters, watermark, the protagonist's face.

scenes.cap: 祭りの支度: 主人公の肩越しPOV＋紙提灯を吊るす昼下がりの村＋提灯を差し出すユイ＋満タンの大灯を見上げる老灯守
scenes.en: Afternoon in the Western-medieval mountain-valley village dressed for a festival. Over-the-shoulder POV: in the lower foreground, only the back of the unseen protagonist's head and one shoulder. Strings of warm paper lanterns are being hung between rustic half-timber cottages. A few steps ahead, Yui holds out a paper lantern toward the viewer with a bright cheeky grin, asking him to take it. Beside a cottage, the gentle elderly lamp-keeper (thin white hair and short white beard, humble village robes and worn apron, cloth cap) tends a small oil lamp and glances up toward the great stone-and-timber beacon-lamp tower, brimming full, that rises in the valley beyond. Mellow late-afternoon light, festive and warm. Pre-modern rustic medieval style. Avoid: modern clothes, concrete, steel, glass, skyscraper, neon, sci-fi, Japanese village, text, letters, watermark, the protagonist's face.

scenes.cap: 谷の灯: 主人公の肩越しPOV＋屋根の上で消えかけの紙提灯の芯を継ぎ火を移すユイ＋眼下の祭りの灯＋まっすぐ燃える大灯
scenes.en: Night on the village wood-shingle rooftops. Over-the-shoulder POV: in the lower foreground, only the back of the unseen protagonist's head and one shoulder. A few steps away on the rooftop crouches Yui, both hands deftly tending a guttering paper lantern, trimming its wick and coaxing a small warm flame back to life, her face lit softly amber from below with a focused fanged half-smile. Far below, the village square glows with a small festival of warm lamps; across the valley the great stone-and-timber beacon-lamp tower burns straight and tall, holding the whole night. Intimate, warm, tender night scene. Pre-modern rustic medieval style. Avoid: modern clothes, concrete, steel, glass, skyscraper, neon, sci-fi, electric light, Japanese village, text, letters, watermark, the protagonist's face.

scenes.cap: 灯らぬことば: 谷じゅうから集まった灯詠み一同が杖を掲げ唱えるが火は戻らず＋手前に呆然とするユイ＋這い寄る灰の靄(主人公なし)
scenes.en: Night in the Western-medieval village square during the catastrophe. The protagonist is not shown. A small gathering of the village's few lamp-lighters, including the gentle old lamp-keeper (thin white hair and short white beard, humble village robes and apron, cloth cap), all raise their lamp-tending staves together and chant in unison toward the dark sky, but not a single flame returns and the air only shudders. In the foreground stands Yui, frozen and stricken, staring up with a fanged mouth open in dismay as the lanterns around them gutter out. Creeping grey ash mist seeps up between rustic half-timber cottages and over the low village fence, draining the color toward dull grey. The great beacon-lamp tower in the valley beyond stands dark. Ominous, fearful, the warmth of the world being pulled away. Pre-modern rustic medieval style. Keep it ashen, NOT snow or winter. Avoid: modern clothes, concrete, steel, glass, skyscraper, neon, sci-fi, Japanese village, text, letters, watermark.

scenes.cap: カンテラの熱: 一人称POV(手＋カンテラ)＋蓋の内側に浮かぶ見知らぬ発光文字＋気だるい声の気配
scenes.en: First-person POV at night in the Western-medieval village street. The viewer's own hand and forearm hold up an old brass kantera lantern, raised close to the face in the lower foreground (the viewer's face is never shown). The lantern has suddenly grown hot: on the inner side of its lifted brass lid, strange unfamiliar glyphs float and glow with warm light, unlike any village script, as if a quiet presence stirs within. Faint motes of warm light drift from the flame, and the rustic half-timber cottages fall away into soft dark behind. Intimate, mysterious, the moment a hidden voice awakens. Avoid: modern items, sci-fi, concrete, neon, guns, any readable real-world text, watermark, the protagonist's face.

scenes.cap: ユイの問い: POV(肩越し)＋袖を強く掴むユイの不安な上目づかい＋灯が消えた直後の薄暗い村路
scenes.en: Over-the-shoulder POV at night in the village street, just after the light has died down. In the lower foreground, only the unseen protagonist's shoulder and one arm. Yui presses in close, gripping his sleeve tightly with both hands, looking up at the viewer with wide worried amber eyes and a serious, shaken expression, her usual cheeky grin gone. The just-dimmed brass kantera throws faint warm light across her face against the surrounding dark. Rustic Western-medieval half-timber cottages loom dim behind. Tense and intimate. Avoid: modern clothes, sci-fi, concrete, neon, guns, text, watermark, the protagonist's face.

scenes.cap: 灰の手先: POV(手前に腕＋カンテラ)＋靄の奥から身を起こす四つ足の小さな灰の影が複数＋身構えるユイ
scenes.en: First-person POV confrontation in the night village alley. The viewer's own forearm and an old brass kantera lantern fill the lower foreground (the viewer's face is never shown), its rekindled warm light spilling outward. Deeper in the alley, several small menacing four-legged shadow-beasts (the ash-servants) rise and stir from a creeping bank of grey ash mist, faintly glowing, grey ash leaking from them. To one side stands Yui in a braced, ready stance, looking ahead at the threat. The warm lantern light pushes back against the cold grey mist. Tense, the first battle. Avoid: snow, winter, cute friendly creatures, modern items, sci-fi, concrete, neon, guns, text, watermark, the protagonist's face.

scenes.cap: 抜かれていく名: POV(腕＋カンテラ)＋路地に立ち尽くす顔見知りの村人たち＋言葉を失い宙を見つめる老婆＋忍び寄る灰
scenes.en: Over-the-shoulder POV running through a narrow Western-medieval village alley at night. In the lower foreground, the unseen protagonist's arm and an old brass kantera lantern lighting the way. Ahead, several familiar villagers stand frozen and rooted in place along the alley, vacant and lost, their words drained away; nearest, a frail old woman gazes blankly into the air, mouth half-open as if a name has slipped from her. Thin grey ash mist creeps low along the stone bases of the half-timber cottages, thicker deeper in. Sorrowful and ominous, the warm lantern a small island of light amid the loss. Avoid: snow, winter, modern items, sci-fi, concrete, neon, guns, text, watermark, the protagonist's face.

scenes.cap: じいちゃんの写本: POV(腕＋カンテラ)＋祖父の机に開いたままの古い写本＋余白の走り書き＋カンテラに照らされる羽根ペンとインク
scenes.en: First-person POV looking down over a desk inside a rustic pre-modern home at night. In the foreground, the unseen protagonist's arm holds an old brass kantera lantern off to one side (the viewer's face is never shown), its warm flame light pooling across the desk. On the worn wooden writing desk lies the grandfather's old open manuscript — a thick hand-copied tome of yellowed parchment pages covered in faded handwritten script, with notes scrawled in the margins, a quill pen and a clay inkpot beside it. Soft amber light catches the open pages while the room falls into warm dark beyond. Intimate, tender, a keepsake left behind. Avoid: any readable real-world text, modern items, sci-fi, concrete, neon, printed/typeset book, guns, watermark, the protagonist's face.

scenes.cap: 乾くまで: 一人称POV(手＋カンテラ)＋開いた祖父の古写本＋余白の祖父の手書き＋乾きかけの灯詞
scenes.en: First-person POV at a grandfather's old writing desk at night, looking down. In the lower foreground the viewer's own hand and forearm hold up an old brass kantera lantern, its small warm flame casting amber light across a worn wooden desk cluttered with quills, an inkpot and bound vellum books. Open on the desk lies the grandfather's ancient hand-copied tome, its yellowed pages dense with handwritten script, faintly glowing lamp-words drying in the margins where a fresh line of the grandfather's handwriting still gleams wet. Intimate, quiet, scholarly warmth against the surrounding dark. Western-medieval pre-modern study. Avoid: modern paper, printed type, electric light, the viewer's face, any modern items, sci-fi, concrete, neon, Japanese architecture, photorealism, text-as-caption, watermark.

scenes.cap: 朝の鐘: 主人公の肩越しPOV＋夜明けの村の鐘楼で鳴る古い鐘＋振り返り掛け合うユイ＋朝靄の谷の村
scenes.en: Over-the-shoulder POV at dawn in the Western-medieval mountain-valley village. In the lower foreground, only the back of the unseen protagonist's head and one shoulder. Above and ahead rises a rustic stone-and-timber village bell tower, its old bronze bell swinging mid-toll in the first pale gold light. A few steps away stands Yui, twisting back toward the viewer mid-banter with a cheeky fanged grin, lit by the cool morning glow. Below, the half-timber cottages of the valley village sit under thin morning mist, the night's faint grey ash haze lifting away. Hopeful, weary-but-bright morning. Avoid: the viewer's face, modern buildings, clock faces, concrete, steel, neon, sci-fi, Japanese gassho roofs, photorealism, watermark, caption text.

scenes.cap: ユイの家: 主人公の肩越しPOV＋鐘楼の下の素朴な室内＋母の手の甲を静かに撫でるユイの優しい横顔
scenes.en: Over-the-shoulder POV inside Yui's humble cottage home at the foot of the village bell tower, warm dim daytime light through a small window. In the lower foreground, only the back and shoulder of the unseen protagonist watching quietly. At the center, Yui sits close beside her seated mother and gently strokes the back of her mother's hand with both of her own, her usual cheeky grin softened into a tender, careful expression, as if memorizing something she refuses to forget. The mother's face is gentle and faintly lost. Rustic Western-medieval interior of timber, plaster and simple cloth. Quiet, loving, melancholy. Avoid: the viewer's face, modern furniture, electric light, sci-fi, concrete, neon, Japanese tatami room, photorealism, watermark, caption text, jewelry on Yui.

scenes.cap: 防柵の夜警: 一人称POV(手＋カンテラ)＋村の木の防柵に沿った見回り＋灯に退く灰の獣の影＋硝子壺の蓄え灯
scenes.en: First-person POV night watch along the village defensive palisade. In the lower foreground the viewer's own hand and forearm hold up the old brass kantera lantern, its newly lit flame casting radiant warm beams across a rough timber-and-stone defensive fence ringing the Western-medieval valley village. Where the light reaches, a faint grey ash beast-shadow shrinks back into the dark beyond the palisade. Nearby, a young village watchman and a small glass jar holding a stored bead of warm lamp-flame catch the glow. Tense but reassuring, the lantern holding the night at bay. Avoid: the viewer's face, modern fences, barbed wire, concrete, steel, floodlights, sci-fi, neon, Japanese architecture, photorealism, watermark, caption text.

scenes.cap: 老灯守の告白: 主人公の肩越しPOV＋夜の村で打ち明ける老灯守＋手元の小さな油灯＋失語しかけの面持ち
scenes.en: Over-the-shoulder POV at night in the Western-medieval village. In the lower foreground, only the back of the unseen protagonist's head and shoulder. Facing the viewer stands the gentle old lamp-keeper with his deeply wrinkled kind face, thin white hair and short white beard, humble village robes and worn apron, cradling a small oil lamp whose dim warm flame lights him from below. His expression is earnest and sorrowful, mid-confession, as if forcing out words he can barely still remember, faint grey ash haze creeping at the edges. Quiet half-timber lanes and a small lamp behind him in the dark. Solemn and tender. Avoid: the viewer's face, modern clothes, sci-fi, concrete, neon, Japanese architecture, photorealism, watermark, caption text.

scenes.cap: 揺れる灯: 一人称POV(手＋カンテラ)＋風もないのに揺れる炎＋宿る声を思わせる漂う光の粒(人物なし・親密な静物)
scenes.en: First-person POV at night in a quiet Western-medieval village street. The viewer's own hand and forearm hold up an old brass kantera lantern close in the foreground (the viewer's face is never shown). Inside the lantern a small warm flame leans and flickers sideways as if stirred by an unseen breath though the night air is dead still, and faint warm motes of light drift up and curl out of it, as if a quiet voice lives within. Behind, the dark rustic half-timber cottages are soft and out of focus. Intimate, hushed, slightly mysterious. NOT modern, no electricity, no neon, no concrete, no sci-fi, no Japanese architecture, no text or letters or watermark, no photorealism.

scenes.cap: 柵の前: POV(手前に地面へ伏せたカンテラ＋腕)＋柵に沿って立ち上がる水の膜＋柵越しに迫る灰狼＋じゅっと退く灰の靄
scenes.en: First-person POV at night before the village's rough wooden palisade fence. In the lower foreground, the viewer's own forearm and an old brass kantera lantern laid down against the packed dirt (the viewer's face is never shown). Along the line of the palisade a glowing membrane-wall of water rises and shimmers upward, and where it meets the creeping grey ash mist the ash hisses and recoils away in wisps. Just beyond the fence stalks the menacing large black wolf-beast (the hairou), faintly glowing with grey ash leaking from its maw, bearing straight in. The dim cottages behind have their windows guttering dark. High tension, the village's lights almost out. NOT modern, no electricity, no neon, no concrete, no sci-fi, no snow or winter, no Japanese architecture, no text or letters or watermark, no photorealism.

scenes.cap: 約束の交わし方: 肩越しPOV＋自分の編んだ灯心の束を差し出すユイ＋夜が戻らぬ灰けた村
scenes.en: Over-the-shoulder POV at night in the ruined Western-medieval village, the land drained of its light. In the lower foreground only the back of the unseen protagonist's shoulder and one hand reaching out. Facing the viewer stands Yui, his childhood friend, holding out toward him a coil of pale beige lampwick thread she has braided herself, her chin set with a stubborn determined look softened by warmth. Around them the empty rustic half-timber cottages sit lightless under a night that no longer lifts, the colour drained ashen-grey. Tender and resolute. NOT modern, no electricity, no neon, no concrete, no sci-fi, no Japanese architecture, no text or letters or watermark, no photorealism.

scenes.cap: 村の門: POV(受け取る手前の腕＋カンテラ)＋震える手で紹介状を握らせる老灯守＋木組みの村の門
scenes.en: First-person POV at the rustic wooden gate in the village's timber palisade at night. In the lower foreground the viewer's own forearm and an old brass kantera lantern (the viewer's face is never shown), one hand reaching to receive. Before the viewer the gentle old lamp-keeper, deeply wrinkled with thin white hair and a short white beard, presses a folded sealed letter of introduction into the viewer's hand with trembling hands, his expression earnest and caring, a small oil lamp glowing beside him. Behind him the heavy timber-and-iron-banded village gate stands open onto the dark road out of the valley. Warm parting lamplight against deep night. NOT modern, no electricity, no neon, no concrete, no sci-fi, no Japanese architecture, no text or readable letters or watermark, no photorealism.

scenes.cap: 村のない朝: 主人公の肩越しPOV＋鐘の鳴らない静かな朝の街道＋灯心を気にして振り返るユイ＋谷を出て二日の広い空
scenes.en: Early morning on an open pre-modern country road, two days out from the valley. Over-the-shoulder POV: in the lower foreground, only the back of the unseen protagonist's head and one shoulder, with a hand resting at the edge of frame. A few steps ahead on the packed dirt-and-stone road lined with low dry-stone walls, Yui twists back toward the viewer, one brow raised in a chiding cheeky grin as she gestures toward the small brass lantern clipped at her left hip. The valley village is gone from sight; only wide rolling grassy hills and an immense pale dawn sky stretch behind her, unnaturally silent with no bell-tower in view. Soft cool morning light warming to amber. Western-medieval rustic world. NOT modern, NOT Japanese village, no concrete, no steel, no neon, no text or watermark.

scenes.cap: 行く当て: 主人公の肩越しPOV(縦)＋ランタンと灯心の束を掲げて見せるユイ＋『あんたが灯して、あたしが消さない』の半身アップ
scenes.en: Mid-morning on the country road, a quiet intimate two-shot. Over-the-shoulder vertical POV: in the lower foreground, only the blurred back of the unseen protagonist's head and shoulder. Close ahead, Yui faces the viewer at half-length, lifting the coil of pale beige lampwick thread from her right hip in one hand while her other hand rests near the small brass kantera lantern clipped at her left hip, a soft proud cheeky grin on her childish round face as if to say 'you light it, I keep it lit.' Warm directional daylight catches her crimson-red hair and amber eyes. Behind her, packed dirt road and low dry-stone walls over grassy hills fall soft and out of focus. Western-medieval rustic style. NOT modern, NOT Japanese, no concrete, no steel, no sci-fi, no neon, no jewelry, no text or watermark.

scenes.cap: 干し飯ふたつ: 主人公の肩越しPOV＋手前に分けた干し飯ふたつ＋街道の先から荷を捨て転がるように駆けてくる怯えた旅人
scenes.en: A tense moment on the open road at mid-morning. Over-the-shoulder POV: in the lower foreground, only the back of the unseen protagonist's head and shoulder, and on a flat stone at the road's edge two small pieces of dried travel rations laid out, half-eaten. Up the packed dirt-and-stone road ahead, a ragged pre-modern traveler comes stumbling and half-running toward the viewer in panic, his dropped bundle and bag tumbling behind him, face wide with fear, one arm thrown up as if shouting a warning. Low dry-stone walls and rolling grassy hills line the road; the sky is bright but the mood is sharp and alarmed. Western-medieval rustic world. NOT modern, NOT Japanese village, no concrete, no steel, no guns, no neon, no text or watermark.

scenes.cap: 峠の森と川: 主人公の肩越しPOV＋せせらぎ沿いの峠道＋倒木を越えて振り返り後ろを気遣うユイ＋知らない木々
scenes.en: Deep in a wooded mountain pass at midday. Over-the-shoulder POV: in the lower foreground, only the back of the unseen protagonist's head and shoulder near a mossy fallen log. Ahead on the rising trail beside a clear pebbled brook, Yui has just stepped over the fallen tree and twists back toward the viewer, one hand on the trunk, a slightly wary but trusting look on her face as she glances at what may lie behind. Tall unfamiliar broadleaf and pine trees, dappled green forest light, and the silver gleam of the running stream climbing the pass. Western-medieval rustic wilderness. NOT modern, NOT Japanese, no concrete, no steel, no power lines, no signage, no neon, no text or watermark.

scenes.cap: 灰の足あと: 主人公の肩越しPOV(手前に腕)＋道脇に薄く溜まる灰色の靄＋灰に半分埋もれた誰のものとも知れぬ足あと(人物なし・不穏)
scenes.en: An ominous discovery just below the wooded pass, late afternoon. First-person POV: the viewer's own forearm and an old brass kantera lantern enter the lower foreground, its small flame casting faint warm light. Just ahead at the side of the descending dirt-and-stone road, a thin bank of creeping grey ash mist has pooled low over the ground, draining the color toward dull grey, and a line of unknown footprints leads away, half-buried and dissolving into the drifting ash. No people at all. Cool fading daylight, tense and quietly dreadful, the same ashen color seen back at the village. Western-medieval rustic world. Keep it ashen grey, NOT snow, NOT winter. No modern items, no concrete, no steel, no neon, no text or watermark.

scenes.cap: 灯らない男: 肩越しPOV＋焚き火のそばにどかりと座り干し肉を頬張る大柄なガク＋幌の荷車・夜の野営
scenes.en: Over-the-shoulder POV at the caravan camp at night. In the lower foreground, only the back of the unseen protagonist's head and one shoulder, softly blurred against the firelight. Across the warm crackling campfire sits the large muscular boy Gaku, sprawled down heavily on the ground, tearing into a strip of dried meat with a bold toothy grin, his bare fists resting easy, no weapon. His tanned skin and short spiky black hair glow in the firelight. Behind him, covered wagons with cloth tarps loom in the dark. A rough, hearty, companionable mood. Western-medieval pre-modern rustic. Avoid: modern clothes, sci-fi, concrete, neon, guns, any weapon, axe, sword, beard, Japanese village, text, watermark, photorealism.

scenes.cap: 野営の食: 主人公の手元POV(差し出される椀＋木の実)＋椀に一番大きな実を置くテオの兄＋分け合う鍋・焚き火
scenes.en: First-person POV at the caravan campfire at night. The viewer's own hand and forearm reach into the lower foreground holding a humble wooden bowl. A shy travel-worn older boy leans in and gently places the single biggest dark sweet berry into the bowl, eyes lowered bashfully. Beside him stands Teo, a lively curious caravan boy of about eleven with tousled brown hair and a friendly open face, offering more berries. A shared cooking pot steams over the warm campfire, river fish and dried meat and unknown vegetables within. Covered wagons behind. A tender, warm, generous mealtime mood. Western-medieval pre-modern rustic. Avoid: modern clothes, sci-fi, concrete, neon, guns, weapons, Japanese village, text, watermark, photorealism.

scenes.cap: 隊商の人々: 肩越しPOV＋声をひそめ護りを請う隊商の長＋灯を守るユイ＋拳を構えるガク・夜の幌車
scenes.en: Over-the-shoulder POV at the caravan camp at night. In the lower foreground, only the back of the unseen protagonist's shoulder. Facing the viewer, a weathered pre-modern caravan master leans in and speaks low, his face grave and pleading, a hand half-raised in entreaty. To one side stands Yui, his childhood friend, listening intently; to the other side the big muscular Gaku stands with a bare fist loosely raised, no weapon, ready. Covered wagons and a low campfire glow behind them, an alliance forming in hushed firelight. Western-medieval pre-modern rustic. Avoid: modern clothes, sci-fi, concrete, neon, guns, weapons, axe, sword, beard on Gaku, Japanese village, text, watermark, photorealism.

scenes.cap: くすんだ灯: 一人称POV(手前に腕＋カンテラ)＋ぼろをまとい現れる灰の手先ドゥド＋くすんで灰に崩れる灯詞の群れ
scenes.en: First-person POV confrontation on the road by the caravan at dusk. The viewer's own forearm and an old brass kantera lantern fill the lower foreground, its small warm flame steady (the viewer's face is never shown). Ahead stands the gaunt hunched ash-servant Doudo alone, his face hidden in deep shadow under a tattered hood, ashen desaturated grey skin and dusty ragged grey robes. Around him several dull, sickly glowing lamp-words hover and crumble from their edges into drifting grey ash. Creeping grey ash mist seeps across the scene, draining the color toward dull grey. Unsettling and quietly threatening. Western-medieval pre-modern rustic. Avoid: a clear visible face on Doudo, snow, winter, bright colors, modern clothes, sci-fi, concrete, neon, guns, weapons, Japanese village, text, watermark, photorealism.

scenes.cap: 灰が晴れて: 風にほどけ消えていくドゥドの灰の名残(人物なし寄り)＋無事な幌の荷車＋暮れ残る空
scenes.en: The aftermath on the road by the caravan at dusk, almost no figure. Where the ash-servant Doudo stood, only a last drift of grey ash unraveling and scattering on the wind, dissolving into nothing without a cry. The creeping grey mist thins and clears, color seeping warmly back into the scene. Behind, the merchant caravan's covered wagons stand intact and safe, a low campfire glowing. Quiet, melancholy relief rather than triumph, the dusk sky softening overhead. Western-medieval pre-modern rustic. Avoid: snow, winter, modern clothes, sci-fi, concrete, neon, guns, weapons, Japanese village, text, watermark, photorealism.

scenes.cap: 呼べない名: 肩越しPOV＋名を思い出せぬテオの兄＋涙をこらえて笑うテオ＋薄く残る灰・夜の野営
scenes.en: Over-the-shoulder POV at the caravan camp at night, a quiet sorrowful scene. In the lower foreground, only the soft blurred shoulder of the unseen protagonist. Facing the viewer, Teo's older brother sits ash-struck and bewildered, a thin grey ash residue clinging to him, gazing at Teo without recognition, struggling to recall a name. Close beside him, Teo, the eleven-year-old caravan boy with tousled brown hair, forces a brave brimming smile while his eyes glisten with held-back tears, one hand on his brother's arm. A faint grey ash haze lingers in the firelit dark. Deeply tender and heartbreaking. Western-medieval pre-modern rustic. Avoid: snow, winter, modern clothes, sci-fi, concrete, neon, guns, weapons, Japanese village, text, watermark, photorealism.

scenes.cap: 門前の市: 人波の中で露店の木札(値札)を覗き込むユイの後ろ姿・軒を連ねる露店・城壁越しの朝の光
scenes.en: Morning in a bustling pre-modern market street just inside a walled trading town. Seen over the unseen viewer's shoulder, the red-haired girl Yui (about 14, simple travel clothes) stands amid a dense crowd, peering at a wooden price tally-token hanging on a string from a stall. Rows of wooden stalls with cloth awnings, hung tokens and stacked wares, rustic traders coming and going, the grey city wall beyond catching soft pale dawn light. Lively, dense, lyrical.

scenes.cap: はじめて喋った声: {name}の手のなかで淡く脈打つ古いカンテラ・灰を一筋灯にほどく・ギルドの薄暗い土間
scenes.en: Inside a dim guild hall, lamplight only. Extreme close on the unseen protagonist's hand cupping an old brass lantern (a kantera: jointed metalwork, soot-stained wind-guard, a small warm-white flame at the wick) that pulses faintly as it unravels a single thread of grey ash back into light. Behind, the shadow of a wooden request-board on an earthen floor. Quiet, mysterious, high contrast, warm light blooming to one point. Only the hand is shown, never the face.

scenes.cap: 三たびの共闘: 灰の奔流に割って入る大柄なガクの背・傍らで構える流れ灯詠みカガリ・割れる市の人波・吹きこぼれる灰喰い虫
scenes.en: Mid-afternoon, daylight dimmed by drifting ash. Seen over the unseen viewer's shoulder: the big black-spiky-haired Gaku (sleeveless teal, red sash, bare fists) plants himself in the path of a surging torrent of grey ash, while beside him the seasoned wandering lamp-singer Kagari (man of 27, stubble, an old worn leather coat, lamp tally-tokens at his hip) stands at ease. The market crowd parts; countless small grey ash-eating gnats spill through. A dynamic moment of allies converging, each role legible. Pre-modern, rustic.

scenes.cap: 【ボス】灰喰い虫の群れ ―灯詞バトル: カンテラを構える{name}の腕・後ろ姿のみ手前・灰喰い虫が一匹ずつ暖色の燠火にほどけて散る決着
scenes.en: The boss's decisive beat. Seen past the protagonist's lantern-raising arm and back only (face never shown): in warm-white lantern light, a swarm of grey ash-eating gnats unravels one by one into real embers and scatters. Gaku's fist sweeps at the side, Yui's hand shields the flame. The ashen gloom turns toward warm color, a counter to the earlier dread. Particle effects, cinematic, the swarm quietly coming undone. Pre-modern market of stone and stalls.

scenes.cap: 次の街へ: 夜明けの街道へ歩き出す三人の後ろ姿(ユイ・ガク・カガリ)・背後に石造の交易街と城壁・滲む街灯
scenes.en: Pre-dawn, the sky just paling. Seen over Aki's shoulder (protagonist unshown): three figures walk away toward the highway. Yui's small back leads (about 14, red hair, travel clothes); the big bare-fisted Gaku beside her (black spiky hair, sleeveless); half a step behind, the wandering lamp-singer Kagari (27, a traveler's cloak, a leather pouch of lamp-tokens at his hip). Behind them the stone trading town and its walls, street-lamps blurring. Lyrical, warm departure, wide framing.
